description: UFR-022 lib-docs manifest. Source of truth for which libraries have a cached PATTERNS.md + LESSONS.md + raw snapshot. Tracked in git. Per-lib snapshots/PATTERNS.md/sources.json/VERSION = untracked, regenerated locally on demand by doc-fetcher + doc-curator agents.

warnings.note: GitHub blob viewer returned chrome content without actual changelog text. Worked around by fetching per-release pages directly.
Stale path from prior refresh — fallback to /docs/working-with-entity-manager/working-with-repository still works.
Stale path from prior refresh — fallback to /docs/working-with-entity-manager/find-options still works.

warnings: https://github.com/expressjs/express/blob/master/Changelog.md returned HTTP 404 — Express uses History.md, not Changelog.md. History.md was fetched successfully, so no data loss.
npmjs.com gated by Cloudflare 403 — used registry.npmjs.org directly
docs.langchain.com/.../chat/google publishes constructor + migration pointer but no side-by-side migration table
docs.langchain.com/oss/javascript/quickstart still 404 (since 2026-05-18)
GitHub Releases page returns 'no releases' — maintainer publishes via npm + CHANGELOG.md. Authoritative source = packages/pg/CHANGELOG.md fetched via gh api.
GitHub Tags API only exposes tags up to v7.14 (pre-monorepo). Use npm dist-tags for modern version discovery.
No CVE / GHSA registered for the prototype-pollution fix in 8.21.0 (#3656) as of 2026-05-20.
Locked museum-backend version 8.20.0 lags upstream latest 8.21.0 by 2 days. Recommend bump for SECURITY fix (#3656).
Snapshot does not include /apis/result, deep /apis/types, /apis/utilities, /features/ssl, /features/native, /features/esm, /features/callbacks, /guides/project-structure.
npmjs.com returns HTTP 403 (anti-bot). Metadata cross-checked via `npm view bcrypt versions time` and `jsdocs.io`. No content loss.
Upstream SECURITY.md still lists 5.0.x as the only supported branch — stale relative to v6.0.0 release. Treat v6.x as the current supported branch (npm dist-tag latest = 6.0.0 is authoritative).
Upstream cadence: 1 release in the last ~12 months. Library in low-maintenance mode. Not a vulnerability, but anchors TD-29 (argon2id migration) rationale.
OWASP 2026 cheat-sheet repositions bcrypt as 'legacy systems only' behind Argon2id + scrypt; still acceptable at cost >= 10. Musaium pin BCRYPT_ROUNDS = 12 — conforming.
https://www.npmjs.com/package/jsonwebtoken returns 403-forbidden (persistent ; GitHub raw README is source of truth — no data loss).

snapshot-2026-05-20.md is a DELTA snapshot ; full upstream text held in snapshot-2026-05-18.md (preserved unchanged). Upstream README and CHANGELOG are byte-identical to the 2026-05-18 capture ; this refresh records verification + Musaium in-tree state changes.
WebFetch 403 on github.com CHANGELOG.md (anti-bot) — used docs.bullmq.io/changelog as substitute
WebFetch 403 on npmjs.com — used registry.npmjs.org JSON API

/guide/jobs/removing-jobs 404 (removal patterns in Queue API + Stalled)

/guide/jobs/job-data 200 but sparse
examples/cluster.{js,ts}, examples/sentinel.ts, examples/pubsub.ts return 404 — no dedicated example files in repo, coverage is README-only
redis.github.io/ioredis/interfaces/RedisOptions.html returns 404 — RedisOptions is a type alias not exported as a separate typedoc page
Release notes for v5.0.0 through v5.8.1 not visible on /releases excerpt — historical migration breakpoints below v5.8.2 may be missing
/docs/languages/js/migration/ — 404 (still broken since 2026-05-18); reconstructed from CHANGELOG
/docs/languages/js/sampling/ — partial coverage (only TraceIdRatioBased documented)
/docs/specs/semconv/general/trace/ — overview only, verify ATTR_* against package source
npmjs.com — 403 anti-bot; sourced versions from registry.npmjs.org JSON API
https://reactnative.dev/docs/right-to-left returned HTTP 404; RTL doctrine fallback = CLAUDE.md + __tests__/rtl/_rtl-style-audit.ts
0.84/0.85 blog posts 404 on direct fetch; only blog-index abstracts captured
Architecture authoring pages (/architecture/fabric-renderer, /threading-model, /bundled-hermes) not refreshed this cycle
GitHub releases date discrepancy (0.83.x patches surfaced April 2025 vs 0.83 blog Dec 2025) documented at face value
https://docs.expo.dev/workflow/babel/ returned 404
Per-module SDK pages carried from 2026-05-18 curation
Security advisory CVE numbers + exact affected ranges not fetched (per-advisory pages). All advisories RSC-scoped; Musaium ships no RSC. Mitigation = stay >=19.2.6 (satisfied).
useFormStatus / requestFormReset / useImperativeHandle full signatures only summarised.
react-native upstream page lacks persister/AsyncStorage guidance; AsyncStorage size/encryption notes in PATTERNS.md are operational, sourced from persister source + RN knowledge

installed 1.16.0 is one patch behind latest 1.16.1 (2026-05-13); ^1.16.0 range permits bump — recommended for proto-pollution/header-injection hardening

v26 migration: legacy interpolation.format callback removed (project clean)

advisory index lists titles only; only CVE-2025-29927 fetched in detail.

warnings: Musaium 1 minor behind latest (9.4.1 → 9.5.1). No breaking change, no advisory. Bump deferred V2 per remediation roadmap D3.
Replay protection on Musaium relies on rate-limiter (5/15 min), NOT on otpauth itself. validate({window:1}) only checks currentness.

warnings: Version drift: declared ^6.3.15, installed 6.3.21 (latest 6.3 patch; API stable across 6.3.x, no breaking change).

Single call site MfaEnrollScreen.tsx:109 displays sensitive TOTP secret with no ecl='H', no onError, no screen-capture protection (FLAG_SECURE), no a11y label. F1/F2 (2026-05-18) still open + new F-SEC-03 (screen-capture) + F-A11Y-04.
RN 0.83 → textEncodingTransformation Babel block NOT required.
No formal release notes for 6.3.x line; npm HTML page 403s WebFetch. No CVE found.
npm registry page 403 Cloudflare (not refetched; gh-api README authoritative)
upstream SECURITY.md stale: lists only 1.0.x supported but lib maintained, latest 1.2.6
npm latest = 8.1.0; GitHub 8.1.1 tag never published to npm (compare 404). ^8.1.0 already newest installable. Prior 'Latest 8.1.1' corrected.
Renders LLM-authored prompt-injectable output. TD-MD-01..04 ALL verified REMEDIATED 2026-05-21 (confirm dialog + new URL().protocol scheme allowlist + image rule suppressed).
Reviewer MUST block any future change that reverts the link gate to startsWith or re-enables the image rule (re-opens SEC-MD-01/02/03).
v3.x latest line NOT compatible with Expo SDK 54+ — 2.2.0 is correct pin for Expo SDK 55. DO NOT bump to v3.
Unencrypted plaintext storage — secrets/PII must use expo-secure-store. No JS-package CVE/GHSA.
TD-AS-01/02/03 OPEN (key namespacing, wrapper try/catch, TanStack cache 2MB cap).
v12.0.0 (2026-02-14) BREAKING: iOS 14+/RN 0.76+ min, Wi-Fi API change requiring Access Wi-Fi Information entitlement. API surface unchanged; bump = deliberate native-config migration.
No CVE/GHSA as of 2026-05-20.
TD-14 OPEN: onlineManager NOT wired to NetInfo (offline-first gap). TD-NI-01/02/03 OPEN.
Latest 7.2.4 is same major (v7) — minor/patch drift, no breaking changes. Bump optional.
No CVE/GHSA for v7.x as of 2026-05-20.
TD-RNAV-01 OPEN: Universal/App Links not configured (custom musaium:// scheme only).
Pinned 2.0.2; npm latest 2.3.1. No advisories on any 2.x.
2.2.1 fixes sticky-header-disappears on RN 0.83 (Musaium's RN version) — strongest bump argument; out of scope for doc refresh, flagged to team.
TD-FL-01 (inline ListEmptyComponent JSX) + TD-FL-02 (maintainVisibleContentPosition for chat) still OPEN.

warnings.reason: Pinned exact 11.0.0; latest stable 11.2.1. No v11.x release is breaking. Recommended bump pulls 11.0.1 Android GeoJSON memory fix + hillshade/color-relief layer types (V2 terrain). Non-blocking.
Patch notes 11.0.2/11.0.3/11.1.1/11.1.2/11.2.1 summarised as Bug Fixes only, not line-audited.

warnings: 0.11.1 is registry latest (terminal); no advisories 2024-2026.
npm HTML page 403s anonymous fetcher; version metadata via npm view CLI.
Single FE consumer (computeLocalCacheKey.ts) is sync, load-bearing backend-parity; expo-crypto (async, not installed) is NOT a viable replacement.

warnings.reason: Pinned ^5.0.12, installed 5.0.12, latest stable 5.0.13. 5.0.12->5.0.13 is devtools-only (PR #3443 + #3469); Musaium ships no devtools middleware. Bump optional, zero runtime risk.

TD-14 race still open: dataModeStore.ts lacks _hydrated + onRehydrateStorage (drift vs 3 sibling settings stores). DataModeProvider.tsx:74-82 reads preference before async AsyncStorage hydration -> transient default 'auto' on cold boot, self-corrects. LOW-MEDIUM. Both prior MINORs (TD-ZUS-01/02) now fixed in source + test-covered.
zustand docs reorganized to docs/reference/{apis,hooks,middlewares,integrations,migrations}/* since 2026-05-18; old paths 404. Re-resolved via GitHub tree.
security-advisories endpoint returned empty []. No CVE/GHSA for zustand 5.0.x as of 2026-05-21.

warnings: Pinned 11.1.1 (intentional V1 hold); latest is 14.0.0. 11.1.1 carries the GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq backport so no security pressure to bump.
DRIFT-1: deps ^11.1.0 vs pnpm.overrides ^11.1.1 dual-source-of-truth (TD-UUID-01, LOW).
DRIFT-3: @types/uuid@^11.0.0 redundant deprecated stub since uuid ships own types (v11.0.3); droppable (LOW).
On latest stable (1.5.4, published 2024-08-05). No upgrade pending; no CVE (Snyk).
Scope correction: used in BOTH museum-backend (scripts/generate-qr-cartels.cjs toBuffer PNG) and museum-web (admin/mfa toString SVG). 2026-05-18 doc wrongly scoped to web only.
MFA QR (web admin/mfa/page.tsx:26) and printed cartels (cartel script) both omit/use errorCorrectionLevel:'M'; doctrine = 'H' for sensitive on-screen secret, 'Q'/'H' for printed media.
Upstream CHANGELOG stale at 1.3.3; no GitHub Releases; npm HTML page 403s WebFetch.
